description: Live streaming platform for sports events with strict AI-agent access controls and high-integrity development workflows.

core_services.name: galaspo-com
features: Dynamic Footer with build-time year calculation

core_services.name: gate
core_services.description: Identity & Access Management (IAM) service. Security proxy for all backend services.
features: HttpOnly cookie management for refresh tokens
Structured JSON logging with PII scrubbing

core_services.name: central
core_services.description: Core management hub for data including team rosters, schedules, and stream metadata.
features: YouTube OAuth flow with encrypted refresh tokens
Monorepo protected web UI with client-side auth context

core_services.name: api
core_services.description: Public-facing GraphQL API gateway for viewer applications.

core_services.name: rec
core_services.description: Mobile hybrid application for live capturing and broadcasting events.
features: Client-side Google SSO (idToken handoff to gate)
RTMP Streaming interface (1080p 60fps native module target)
Dynamic digital zoom cap logic based on sensor resolution

core_services.name: creators
core_services.description: Asset management and submission platform for community-contributed creative content.
features: Integration with central for asset delivery

core_services.name: infra
core_services.description: Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC), deployment configurations, and operational tooling.
features: Terraform for GCP target environment (GKE, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Redis)

technical_standards.testing: Test-Driven Development (TDD) required. Minimum 80% coverage using Jest. Resolvers must use isolated mocks.
technical_standards.monorepo_hooks: Husky and lint-staged implemented at root. Strict AI role-based commit validation enforcing allowed file types per agent.
technical_standards.security: ReBAC enforcement, no PII logging, HttpOnly cookies for web auth, direct-to-GCS uploads to bypass API bottlenecks.
